title: scutellaria assamica
intro: Scutellaria assamica, also known as the Assam skullcap, is a plant species native to the northeastern regions of India and parts of Southeast Asia, characterized by its small, blue or purple flowers. This plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and neuroprotective effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria assamica include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and protecting against age-related cognitive decline. In traditional herbal medicine, Scutellaria assamica is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various ailments.
